prose: Frontier-orbital energies of benzene computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), exact four-center integrals (no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, with PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at DFT level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: status=ok, trustworthy=true. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV (index 20), LUMO = −0.41574728 eV (index 21), HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV. The near-degenerate HOMO/HOMO−1 and LUMO/LUMO+1 pairs reflect benzene's D6h symmetry. Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP ≈ 7.0468 eV, vertical EA ≈ 0.4157 eV, chemical hardness η = 3.3155 eV, electrophilicity ω = 2.0996 eV. Total energy: −232.33724 Hartree. Output JSON: benzene_frontier_dft_b3lyp_def2tzvp.json. No warnings were reported by the engine (warnings array is empty).
